blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 34°F.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
